title: Decadent Rich French Potato Gratin
description: A rich and creamy potato dish featuring lardons and a perfect brunch option, this French potato gratin is sure to please with its resinous and molten texture, and is onion and garlic free for added convenience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, render the lardons over medium heat until crispy.
In a separate bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and kosher salt, and toss to coat.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Sprinkle a quarter of the gruyere cheese and a quarter of the crispy lardons over the potatoes.
Drizzle a quarter of the heavy cream over the top of the potatoes.
Repeat the layering process three more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Dot the top of the cheese with the butter.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
